curation_notes: Patch modifies only src/smolagents/local_python_executor.py (1 non-test source file). The fix wraps static tool functions returned by evaluate_name with safer_func, which checks return values against unauthorized modules and DANGEROUS_FUNCTIONS. Previously, static_tools[name.id] was returned without any safety wrapper, allowing sandbox escape via indirect attribute access on return values. Kept pre-assigned class command-injection (CWE-94) since the sandbox escape enables arbitrary code/command execution. No sibling files share the same vulnerability pattern; remote_executors.py does not use the same evaluate_name/static_tools dispatch logic.
